channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-19447] conf-sanity test_41c: ASSERTION( request->rq_pill.rc_reqmsg != ((void *)0x5a5a5a5a5a5a5a5aL) ) failed on RHEL 10.0
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for jianyu <yujian@whamcloud.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/f4bdc498-e7db-4333-a32d-1c662301023a

test_41c failed with the following error:

Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: umount -d -f /mnt/lustre-mds4
LustreError: 502338:0:(client.c:2837:__ptlrpc_req_put()) ASSERTION( request->rq_pill.rc_reqmsg != ((void *)0x5a5a5a5a5a5a5a5aL) ) failed: 
LustreError: 502338:0:(client.c:2837:__ptlrpc_req_put()) LBUG
CPU: 0 UID: 0 PID: 502338 Comm: osp-pre-0-3 Kdump: loaded Tainted: P           OE     -------  ---  6.12.0-55.34.1_lustre.el10.x86_64 #1
Tainted: [P]=PROPRIETARY_MODULE, [O]=OOT_MODULE, [E]=UNSIGNED_MODULE
Hardware name: Red Hat KVM, BIOS 0.5.1 01/01/2011
Call Trace:
 <TASK>
 dump_stack_lvl+0x4e/0x70
 lbug_with_loc.cold+0x5/0x42 [libcfs]
 __ptlrpc_req_put.isra.0+0x2ca/0x2d0 [ptlrpc]
 fld_client_rpc+0x33d/0x680 [fld]
 fld_server_lookup+0x217/0x390 [fld]
 osp_precreate_send+0x88a/0xe80 [osp]
 osp_precreate_thread+0x5a6/0x1260 [osp]
 ? __schedule+0x261/0x640
 ? __pfx_autoremove_wake_function+0x10/0x10
 ? __pfx_osp_precreate_thread+0x10/0x10 [osp]
 kthread+0xd2/0x100
 ? __pfx_kthread+0x10/0x10
 ret_from_fork+0x34/0x50
 ? __pfx_kthread+0x10/0x10
 ret_from_fork_asm+0x1a/0x30
 </TASK>
Kernel panic - not syncing: LBUG
CPU: 0 UID: 0 PID: 502338 Comm: osp-pre-0-3 Kdump: loaded Tainted: P           OE     -------  ---  6.12.0-55.34.1_lustre.el10.x86_64 #1
Tainted: [P]=PROPRIETARY_MODULE, [O]=OOT_MODULE, [E]=UNSIGNED_MODULE
Hardware name: Red Hat KVM, BIOS 0.5.1 01/01/2011
Call Trace:
 <TASK>
 dump_stack_lvl+0x4e/0x70
 panic+0x113/0x2dd
 lbug_with_loc.cold+0x1a/0x42 [libcfs]
 __ptlrpc_req_put.isra.0+0x2ca/0x2d0 [ptlrpc]
 fld_client_rpc+0x33d/0x680 [fld]
 fld_server_lookup+0x217/0x390 [fld]
 osp_precreate_send+0x88a/0xe80 [osp]
 osp_precreate_thread+0x5a6/0x1260 [osp]
 ? __schedule+0x261/0x640
 ? __pfx_autoremove_wake_function+0x10/0x10
 ? __pfx_osp_precreate_thread+0x10/0x10 [osp]
 kthread+0xd2/0x100
 ? __pfx_kthread+0x10/0x10
 ret_from_fork+0x34/0x50
 ? __pfx_kthread+0x10/0x10
 ret_from_fork_asm+0x1a/0x30
 </TASK>

Test session details:
clients: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/117076 - 6.12.0-55.34.1.el10_0.x86_64
servers: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/117076 - 6.12.0-55.34.1_lustre.el10.x86_64

<<Please provide additional information about the failure here>>

VVVVVVV DO NOT REMOVE LINES BELOW, Added by Maloo for auto-association VVVVVVV
conf-sanity test_41c - onyx-77vm14 crashed during conf-sanity test_41c
item.summary: conf-sanity test_41c: ASSERTION( request->rq_pill.rc_reqmsg != ((void *)0x5a5a5a5a5a5a5a5aL) ) failed on RHEL 10.0

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment:
"Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>" merged in patch https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/63492/
Subject: LU-19447 fld: fix an error handling in fld_client_rpc()
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set:
Commit: 7c3bed5174889d2a0f74f73acb8cf696c484b3e7

"Zhenyu Xu <bobijam@whamcloud.com>" uploaded a new patch: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/63492
Subject: LU-19447 fld: fix an error handling in fld_client_rpc()
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: 73f9c5f3edeec15c3b9edeb65f239d4674786cdd
bobijam can you please have a look?

sanity-scrub test 10a hit the same issue:
https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/df1c7c05-0a9e-41dd-8762-4f13b58e6c99

https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/bd329ddf-1cfc-4798-8e6f-7e3cd046b926

Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: umount -d -f /mnt/lustre-mds4
LustreError: 498002:0:(client.c:2854:__ptlrpc_req_put()) ASSERTION( count >= 0 ) failed: Invalid ref count -1
LustreError: 498002:0:(client.c:2854:__ptlrpc_req_put()) LBUG

https://testing.whamcloud.com/sub_tests/4c5446b2-8f42-4c9b-a791-ff6a96699322
